items.title: House price and real-estate regression
items.description: Report test RMSE or MAE in dollars (or thousands) so buyers and analysts see typical prediction error on unseen listings after training on historical sales.

items.title: Demand and revenue forecasting
items.description: Compare forecast models on held-out weeks using RMSE (penalizes stock-out scale misses) or MAE (robust when promotions create rare spikes).

items.title: Weather and energy load prediction
items.description: Utilities benchmark temperature and load models with RMSE in °C or MW — standard leaderboard metrics for continuous targets.

items.title: Linear regression model selection
items.description: After fitting OLS on train data, pick polynomial degree or feature set by lowest validation RMSE before final test RMSE report.

items.title: Neural network regression heads
items.description: Deep models with linear output heads trained on MSE are evaluated on test RMSE/MAE the same way as classical regressors — metric role is unchanged.
